/usr/bin/ar qc "WolfsDen_artefacts/Release/libWolf's Den_SharedCode.a" CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/Source/PluginProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/Source/PluginEditor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/Source/engine/SynthEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/Source/engine/TheoryEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/Source/engine/MidiPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/Source/engine/FxEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/Source/ui/MainComponent.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors_ara.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors_lv2_libs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_gui_extra/juce_gui_extra.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Harfbuzz.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Sheenbidi.c.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_events/juce_events.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_core/juce_core.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_devices/juce_audio_devices.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_formats/juce_audio_formats.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/WolfsDen.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_utils/juce_audio_utils.mm.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib "WolfsDen_artefacts/Release/libWolf's Den_SharedCode.a"
